title: Epic Helm applies AL +4 and Hit +4 while equipped

plan.title: Epic Helm applies AL +4 and Hit +4 while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Epic Helm to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify AL plus the hit-roll modifier.

notes: Place test_primary_creature_mod_0 on player_1 field as primary so the hit modifier comes only from Epic Helm.

steps: Player 1 plays Epic Helm and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect effective AL and hit roll modifier.
manualVerification: Confirm both modifiers apply only while Epic Helm remains equipped.
riskNotes: Covers a mixed AL and Hit equip modifier.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Epic Helm AL/Hit equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
